description_long: This oven features a sleek, rectangular design with a predominantly metallic gray finish. The front panel includes a large mesh grille, likely serving as a vent or filter, and a small rectangular control panel at the top center with a digital display and several touch-sensitive buttons. The oven door appears to be integrated into the front face, with a subtle, flush handle on the right side for opening. The sides and back are plain, smooth, and unadorned, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. The overall construction suggests a built-in or under-cabinet installation, typical for modern urban kitchens. The materials and finish give it a contemporary, professional look suitable for residential or light commercial use.
description: A modern, metallic gray oven with a mesh front grille, digital control panel, and a flush handle, designed for built-in installation. Its minimalist, smooth surfaces and compact form make it ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the mesh grille, digital control panel, and flush handle on the right side.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, smooth metallic surface with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned metallic back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain, smooth metallic surface, mirroring the left side.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel is a narrow horizontal strip centered at the top of the front face, featuring a small digital display in the middle flanked by several touch-sensitive buttons. The buttons are arranged in a linear fashion and are marked by simple geometric icons. The panel is minimalistic, with no visible knobs or protruding elements.
attribute_door_handle_type: The door handle is a flush, integrated rectangular cutout located on the right side of the mesh grille. It is subtle, with no protruding parts, and appears to be made of the same metallic material as the rest of the oven, designed for a clean, modern look.
attribute_ventilation_features: A large mesh grille occupies most of the front lower section, likely serving as a ventilation or filter feature.
